title: Sembang Santai Hujung Minggu
opening: Assalamualaikum! Lama tak jumpa. Macam mana hujung minggu awak? Harapnya taklah lemau sangat, kan?

t1.prompt: Assalamualaikum! Lama tak jumpa. Macam mana hujung minggu awak? Harapnya taklah lemau sangat, kan?
t1.promptTranslation: Assalamualaikum (Ah-sah-lah-moo-ah-lai-koom)! (Peace be upon you/Greeting - typical Malay greeting). Long time no see. How was your weekend? Hopefully, not too sluggish, right?

t2.prompt: Wah, seronoknya! Ceritalah sikit, apa yang awak buat sampai bersemangat macam ni?
t2.promptTranslation: Wah (Wah), how fun! Tell me a bit, what did you do to be so spirited?

t3.prompt: Kadang-kadang, hujung minggu yang santai tu memang nikmat. Awak jenis yang suka rehat-rehat kat rumah atau ada aktiviti lain untuk hilangkan stres?
t3.promptTranslation: Kadang-kadang (Kah-dang-kah-dang), sometimes, a relaxed weekend is truly enjoyable. Are you the type who likes to chill at home or do you have other activities to relieve stress?

t4.prompt: Aduh, kesiannya. Hujung minggu patutnya masa untuk rehat. Apa yang buat awak sibuk sangat tu? Harapnya bukan kerja yang tak berkesudahan, kan?
t4.promptTranslation: Aduh (Ah-dooh), oh dear, that's a pity. The weekend should be a time for rest. What made you so busy? Hopefully, it wasn't endless work, right?

t5.prompt: Oh, menariknya! Destinasi mana yang awak tuju? Saya pun dah lama tak merayau jauh-jauh, asyik terperuk kat sini je.
t5.promptTranslation: Oh, how interesting! Which destination did you go to? I haven't travelled far for a long time either, always stuck here.

t6.prompt: Bagus tu, penting ada minat sendiri. Kadang-kadang, bila kita terlalu fokus pada kerja, kita lupa nak luangkan masa untuk diri sendiri. Teruskan je, biar tak tepu!
t6.promptTranslation: That's good, it's important to have your own interests. Sometimes, when we focus too much on work, we forget to make time for ourselves. Keep it up, so you don't get stagnant!

t7.prompt: Ah, memanglah seronok dapat meluangkan masa dengan orang tersayang. Hubungan sosial ni penting tau, biar tak rasa sunyi dan ada tempat nak berkongsi cerita.
t7.promptTranslation: Ah, it's really enjoyable to spend time with loved ones. Social connections are important, you know, so you don't feel lonely and have someone to share stories with.

t8.prompt: Kerja memang takkan habis. Ingat, jaga kesihatan mental dan fizikal. Jangan sampai burnout pula. Kena pandai cari masa untuk diri sendiri juga.
t8.promptTranslation: Work will never end. Remember, take care of your mental and physical health. Don't burn out. You need to know how to find time for yourself too.

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, boleh awak ulang semula? Saya kurang jelas.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, could you repeat that? I'm not very clear.

t-end.prompt: Baiklah, saya kena minta diri dulu. Seronok bersembang dengan awak. Jumpa lagi ya!
t-end.promptTranslation: Alright, I have to excuse myself now. It was nice chatting with you. See you again!
